intro.title: BTC 3-Body 7-Code AI Wellness Center
intro.subTitle: We analyze your 3-Body (Body, Mind, Brain) and 7-Code energy balance with AI to recommend personalized wellness solutions.

userInfo.title: Register User Information
userInfo.name: Name
userInfo.agreeNotice: Enter your phone number to receive your AI Analysis Report on mobile instantly!
userInfo.agreeRequire: [Required] I consent to the collection and use of personal information.
userInfo.privacyTitle: 📋 Consent to Collection and Use of Personal Information
userInfo.privacyItemsDetail: Name, Gender, Birth Month/Year, Phone Number (optional), Full-body/Face Photos, Brain Cognitive Response Data, 7-Code checklist selections
userInfo.privacyPurposeDetail: 3-Body integrated balance assessment & wellness status analysis, historical comparison analysis
userInfo.privacyRetentionDetail:
• Registered Members: Retained for the duration of membership (destroyed within 3 months of withdrawal)
• Guest Visitors: Automatically destroyed after 6 months from assessment date
userInfo.privacyThirdPartyDetail: Photos are temporarily transmitted to Google LLC servers (USA) for AI vision analysis and are deleted immediately upon completion. No other third-party sharing is performed.
userInfo.privacyRightsDetail: You have the right to refuse consent. However, you will not be able to use the 3-Body wellness assessment services if you refuse.
userInfo.wellnessNotice: ※ This system is a wellness program that measures posture, movement, and memory to assist with health management, and is not related to medical diagnosis.
userInfo.selectMemberAlert: Please select an existing member from the list above.
userInfo.errorBirth: Please enter your date of birth.
userInfo.errorConsent: Please consent to the collection and use of personal information.

waitingList.title: Real-time Waiting List
waitingList.emptySub: Please register first on the Pre-Registration device.
waitingList.measureClickNotice: * Click to proceed to the posture scanning screen immediately.

speech.startAssessment: Starting assessment for {{name}}. Please stand properly in front of the camera.
speech.startMemoryTest: Starting the grocery shopping memory test.
speech.startReactionTest: Starting the cognitive response test. Raise your right hand when you see a green light, raise your left hand when you see a blue light, and raise both hands when you see a white light. Do not move when you see a red light. Please stand so your upper body is visible on the camera.
speech.startSevenCodeTest: This is the 7-Code wellness screening. Please select all applicable items.
speech.distractionStart: Now, try solving 2 math questions in 15 seconds.
speech.shoppingStart: Now, find and click the {{count}} items you just saw.
speech.priceQuizStart: You selected {{correct}} out of {{total}} items. Now, enter the total price of the items shown with prices!

brainTest.reactionSubtitle: Control your impulses according to the color rules
brainTest.memorySubtitle: Remember the items and select them from the cart
brainTest.greenRule: 🟢 Green Light → Quick raise your right hand
brainTest.blueRule: 🔵 Blue Light → Quick raise your left hand
brainTest.redRule: 🔴 Red Light → Stay still! Do not move
brainTest.warningRule: ⚠️ Warning: Later, the arrows will show random directions. Focus on the colors, not the arrow directions!
brainTest.memoryRule1: 🛒 Remember the images of 8 items for 20 seconds
brainTest.memoryRule2: 💰 Remember the total sum of the priced items
brainTest.upperBodyNotice: Please stand so your upper body is visible
brainTest.showRequiredPoints: Show required keypoints to the camera
brainTest.raiseRightHand: Please raise your right hand above your head
brainTest.raiseLeftHand: Please raise your left hand above your head
brainTest.raiseRightSec: 🟢 Raise right hand above shoulder for 1s
brainTest.raiseLeftSec: 🔵 Raise left hand above shoulder for 1s
brainTest.handsNoticeSub: Detection may take longer in dark or distant environments.
brainTest.handsAdjustCamera: If not detected, please adjust the camera position.
brainTest.distractionMessage: 🧠 Try solving 2 math questions in 15 seconds!
brainTest.shoppingInstructions: 👆 Click and select the {{count}} items you memorized
brainTest.cartEmptyGuide: Touch the memorized items to put them in the cart.
brainTest.priceQuizTitle: What is the total price of the items shown with prices?

healthNeeds.title: Primary Areas of Focus for Your Health & Well-being
healthNeeds.subtitle: Please select your goals for your physical, emotional, and cognitive well-being.
healthNeeds.subNotice: Multiple choices allowed. You can also type in your own focus area below.

sevenCode.title: 7-CODE Wellness Screening
sevenCode.subtitle: Please select all symptoms that apply to you or you frequently experience.
sevenCode.subNotice: Trust your intuition and select what resonates.

systemCheck.title: Device Status Check
systemCheck.cameraCheckDesc:
Verify that your full body (head to toe) fits in the screen.
If alone, press the 5-second auto-capture button in the center
and move to a position where your full body is visible.
systemCheck.checkDoneDesc:
All diagnosis environments are ready.
Moving to the main system.

assessment.completeSubText: Please check the scan history below and start AI analysis.
assessment.notCompleteTitle: Some tests are not completed yet
assessment.notCompleteSubText: You need to complete all tests to start AI comprehensive analysis.
assessment.dataSaveNotice: 💾 Your scanning data is automatically saved locally when starting analysis.
assessment.dataSaveSub: You can re-analyze from the saved data without scanning again in case of error.
assessment.liteSub: Specialized assessment for face & cognitive reaction speeds
assessment.postureFrontGuidance: Please stand so your entire body is visible from the front.
assessment.postureSideGuidance: Please stand sideways and align your center of gravity.
assessment.balanceTestGuidance: Close your eyes, stand on one foot, and maintain your balance.
assessment.brainMemoryGuidance: Memorize the grocery items for 10 seconds, then drag and put them in the cart.
assessment.faceAnalysisGuidance: Align your face to the center of the screen and make a bright expression.
assessment.sevenCodeCheckGuidance: Please select symptoms and emotions you have felt frequently recently.
assessment.bodyNotVisibleDetail: The entire body is not fully visible. Please step back and retake the photo.
assessment.bodyNotVisibleSpeech: The entire body is not fully visible. Please step back and retake the photo.
assessment.personNotFoundDetail: AI did not detect a person clearly. If the photo looks normal, proceed manually or retake.
assessment.personNotFoundSpeech: No person was clearly detected. Please check the photo and proceed manually or retake.
assessment.jointsDetected: AI detected {{count}} keypoints. Suitable for analysis.
assessment.retakeSpeech: Retaking the photo. Please get ready.
assessment.allTestsDoneSpeech: All scans completed. Please press the analysis button on the screen.
assessment.analyzingSpeech: This analysis was developed by experts at Brain Training Center, researchers, and universities, integrating the latest AI technologies. This is a wellness program for posture, movement, and memory to assist with health management, and is not a medical diagnosis. Analysis takes about 1 minute.
assessment.reportGeneratedSpeech: Analysis report has been generated. Please check the results.
assessment.quotaErrorText: We are experiencing high traffic on our AI servers. Please press the 'Re-analyze' button in a moment to run analysis using your safely saved photos.
assessment.apiErrorText: A temporary connection error occurred with the AI analysis server. (Detail: {{error}}) Your photos and data are safely saved. Click 'Re-analyze' below to resume analysis without re-scanning.
assessment.confirmStop: Do you want to stop assessment and return to the main screen? Unsaved progress may be lost.
assessment.academicNotice: This analysis was developed by BTC experts, researchers, and universities using the latest AI vision technology.
assessment.scansAnalyzing: Proprietary AI models are analyzing your physical alignment and movement data.
assessment.guideFront: Align with guidelines and stand facing the camera with your full body visible.
assessment.guideSide: Align your body center with the vertical line and stand sideways.
assessment.guideBalance: Close your eyes, stand on one foot, and maintain balance.
assessment.guideArmRaise: Raise your arms as high as possible.
assessment.guideFlexibility: Make a large gesture and press the capture button.
assessment.guideFace: Set lighting bright, fit your face inside the oval, and look straight ahead.

camera.accessError: Cannot access camera ({{error}}). Please check permissions.
camera.prepFaceSpeech: Please set the lighting bright. Capture will start in 5 seconds. Get ready.
camera.prepSpeech: Capture will start in 5 seconds. Get ready.
camera.balancePrepSpeech: Test will start in 5 seconds. Please maintain your balance for {{duration}} seconds. Get ready.
camera.strengthPrepSpeech: Test will start in 5 seconds. Please repeat the movement for {{duration}} seconds. Get ready.
